message:
test: add cross-module integration test for config → ewma → retry

Chains PaneFilterConfig, PanePriorityConfig, EwmaWithVariance, RateEstimator,
and RetryPolicy to verify the full pane-selection → rate-tracking → retry-
scheduling pipeline. 6 tests covering filter gating, priority-driven retry
aggressiveness, EWMA output rate tracking, anomaly detection with priority
escalation, retry delay capping, and the full end-to-end pipeline.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
